title: : Harris County Sheriff Bodycam Footage — Arrests & Traffic Stops 2026

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act (Chapter 552, Texas Government Code), I hereby request the following records:
All body camera and dashcam footage recorded by officers of the Harris County Sheriff's Office between January 1, 2026 and March 31, 2026 involving traffic stops resulting in arrest, DUI arrests, foot pursuits, use of force incidents, and any high-activity or notable encounters.
I request the footage be provided in digital format (.mp4 or similar) via secure download link. The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.
In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by email attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.
Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response within 10 business days.
Sincerely,
John Beck
johnbeck3399@gmail.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

JOHN BECK
